unit_command: make test-unit  (runs: cd app && npx vitest run)
component_lib: none — no @testing-library/react in devDependencies or tests; component logic is tested at the pure-function/storage layer only; MarmotContext is explicitly called out as 'difficult to unit test' in pendingRequestsSection.test.ts:12
test_locations: app/tests/unit/*.test.ts — top-level unit tests (storage, scoring, keys, etc.)
app/tests/unit/marmot/*.test.ts — marmot-ts and MLS logic tests (epochResolver, welcomeSubscription, joinRequestHandler, etc.)
app/tests/e2e/groups-*.spec.ts — all groups E2E tests (run only when E2E_GROUPS=1)
app/tests/e2e/helpers/ — shared helpers: auth-helpers.ts, clear-state.ts, dismiss-error-overlay.ts, relay-query.ts

compose_services: strfry (dockurr/strfry:latest) on port 7777 — in-memory relay (tmpfs), config from strfry.e2e.conf
blossom-mock (node:22-alpine) on port 3001 — mock image upload server from scripts/blossom-mock.mjs
e2e.test_pattern: groups-*.spec.ts (matched via playwright.config.ts testMatch when E2E_GROUPS=1; non-groups tests use testIgnore)
e2e.playwright_config: app/playwright.config.ts — fullyParallel:false, workers:1, timeout:120_000 (groups), actionTimeout:30_000 (groups), Chromium only
e2e.two_context_example_file: app/tests/e2e/groups-admin.spec.ts:93 (three contexts: USER_A, USER_B, USER_C) and app/tests/e2e/groups-forward-secrecy.spec.ts:95 (two contexts: USER_A, USER_B)
e2e.bootUser_pattern: app/tests/e2e/groups-admin.spec.ts:9–31 — browser.newContext → suppressErrorOverlay → addInitScript(localStorage inject) → newPage → goto('/') → clearAppState → reload → goto('/groups/')
e2e.command: make test-e2e-groups  (runs: docker-compose up → E2E_GROUPS=1 node scripts/run-e2e.mjs → docker-compose down)

make_targets.test: make test  (runs test-unit then test-e2e sequentially)
make_targets.test_unit: make test-unit  (cd app && npx vitest run)
make_targets.e2e: make test-e2e-groups  (ensure-playwright + e2e-up + E2E_GROUPS=1 node scripts/run-e2e.mjs + e2e-down)
make_targets.e2e_single_file: make test-e2e-image-sharing  (same infra but passes a single spec file to run-e2e.mjs — pattern reusable for cancel-pending spec)
make_targets.dev: make run-dev  (cd app && npm run dev)
make_targets.platform_stamp: app/node_modules/.platform_$(uname -s)-$(uname -m) — missing or stale stamp triggers npm ci + fresh .next/out wipe; all targets depend on ensure-deps

i18n_test_pattern: Present in app/tests/unit/manageInviteLinksModal.test.ts:103–121 — two separate it() blocks, one for 'en' and one for 'de', each calling getCopy(lang) from '@/src/lib/i18n' and asserting exact string values. The cancel-pending feature must follow the same pattern: import getCopy, assert en.<key> and de.<key> for every new string.
ci: No .github/workflows directory exists in the repo. No CI configuration found. Tests are run manually via make.
key_files: app/tests/e2e/helpers/clear-state.ts — INDEXEDDB_DATABASES list; must add any new DB here if the cancel flow introduces one (currently no new DB expected)
app/tests/e2e/helpers/auth-helpers.ts — USER_A/B/C deterministic keypairs + computeTestKeypairs(); USER_B.npub is the 'offline invitee' for AC-H
app/tests/e2e/groups-admin.spec.ts — canonical two/three-context serial test pattern with bootUser + inviteMember helpers
app/tests/e2e/groups-forward-secrecy.spec.ts — two-context pattern closest to AC-H (A acts, B observes); sendChatMessage helper reusable for post-cancel chat assertion
app/tests/e2e/groups-invite-link.spec.ts — full flow example with openGroupDetail, modal interaction, dismissErrorOverlay
app/tests/unit/marmot/epochResolver.test.ts — marmot-ts mock shape (vi.mock('@internet-privacy/marmot-ts', ...) with getGroupMembers, serializeClientState, etc.)
app/tests/unit/marmot/joinRequestHandler.test.ts — closest unit test pattern for a new MarmotContext helper (mock storage layer, test pure handler logic)
app/src/components/groups/MemberList.tsx — confirmedPubkeys prop already drives isPending and the existing 'pending' badge (FR-1 partially done); Cancel button goes here
app/pages/groups.tsx:68–120 — confirmedPubkeys state derivation from getMemberProfiles; Cancel handler will live in this page or be passed down
notes_for_planner: The pending badge and confirmedPubkeys machinery ALREADY EXISTS: MemberList.tsx:43 derives isPending from confirmedPubkeys, MemberList.tsx:130–138 renders the badge, and groups.tsx:68–120 builds the confirmedPubkeys Set from getMemberProfiles(). FR-1 is partially implemented — the new work is adding the Cancel button to MemberListItem alongside the badge.
No @testing-library/react is installed. Component-level tests are NOT written for this project. Unit tests stay at the storage/pure-function layer; UI correctness is covered by E2E only.

MarmotContext is explicitly flagged as hard to unit test (pendingRequestsSection.test.ts:12). The cancel handler (cancelPendingInvitation) should be tested indirectly: mock mlsGroup.commit at the unit level for the logic, and rely on E2E for the full flow.

The marmot-ts mock in epochResolver.test.ts:9–32 is the reference for vi.mock('@internet-privacy/marmot-ts', ...) — includes getGroupMembers, serializeClientState, deserializeClientState, getEpoch, Proposals stubs. New tests that exercise cancelPendingInvitation will need Proposals.proposeRemove and Proposals.proposeUpdateMetadata added to this mock.

clearAppState in clear-state.ts:3–13 lists 9 IndexedDB DBs. No new DB is needed for cancel-pending (the feature reuses quizzl-member-profiles for pending detection and quizzl-groups-state for MLS state). The list does NOT need updating.

The bootUser pattern injects identity via addInitScript (before page load), not after. This is critical: auth-helpers USER_B is the natural offline invitee for AC-H because B is never booted in the cancel test.
E2E test naming convention: groups-cancel-pending.spec.ts. Place in app/tests/e2e/ to be picked up by the groups-*.spec.ts glob.

The make test-e2e-image-sharing target shows how to run a single groups spec file: E2E_GROUPS=1 node scripts/run-e2e.mjs tests/e2e/groups-image-sharing.spec.ts. Use the same pattern for iterative development of the cancel spec.

i18n: getCopy is exported from app/src/lib/i18n.ts:1141. The Copy type gate at compile time means missing keys cause TS errors — the vitest i18n tests are a runtime double-check, not the primary guard.

The cancel feature test (AC-H) only needs TWO contexts (ctxA admin, offline USER_B as phantom invitee). USER_B never boots — A just uses USER_B.npub as the invite target, then cancels before B ever connects.
